overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring wet streets reflecting neon lights, massive digital billboards, and distinctive angular architecture. The footage appears to be from Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing ray-traced lighting and high-fidelity urban environments as the player moves from a covered sidewalk through an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban sidewalk with digital billboard wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk beneath building overhangs, observing the neon-lit street to the right

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving past on the wet street, headlights reflecting on the pavement

entered.detail: dark concrete building wall with vertical architectural lines running along the sidewalk
tall building facade covered with large illuminated advertisements and neon displays
metal railings separating the pedestrian sidewalk from the vehicle street
elevated pedestrian bridge or building connector spanning above the street in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered urban sidewalk at night, flanked by a dark concrete building wall on the left and a street with metal barriers on the right. Tall digital billboards illuminate the right side of the frame with neon advertisements, while futuristic vehicles occasionally pass by on the wet asphalt. The camera moves steadily forward beneath building overhangs, creating a sheltered, corridor-like atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street approaching a distinctive geometric building structure

events.description: passing a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction wearing a white jacket

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk and approaching a large distinctive yellow angular building structure visible ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket and dark pants walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: futuristic building with sharp angular yellow roof and cyan neon accent lights
tall poles with bright linear LED lights illuminating the street and sidewalk

segments.scene_description: As the camera progresses, the enclosed sidewalk opens slightly to reveal a striking yellow geometric building ahead with cyan neon accents. A pedestrian in a white jacket approaches and passes by, walking in the opposite direction. The digital billboards from the previous section recede as new street lighting becomes prominent, and the concrete building wall fades into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection beneath an elevated transit line

events.description: passing the yellow angular building and entering the open intersection area beneath the elevated tracks
crossing the street at the intersection, moving from sidewalk onto the crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: navigating around the yellow structure and crossing the street at the intersection, following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead in the same direction toward the intersection crosswalk

entered.detail: raised train or monorail track running above the intersection with heavy support pillars
modern building with illuminated windows and vertical neon signage
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines painted on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a wide intersection as the camera passes the yellow geometric building, which now dominates the left side of the frame. An elevated transit line with heavy support pillars spans overhead. The camera crosses the street following crosswalk markings, moving toward a modern glass office building on the right while navigating around the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with vertical neon column and commercial buildings

events.description: continuing across the intersection crosswalk with traffic visible on the right

agents.ego_description: completing the street crossing at the intersection, surrounded by bright neon signage and building lights

entered.detail: tall building facade covered in vertical golden-yellow neon light strips creating a glowing column effect

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera completing the crossing of the wide intersection, with a striking vertical neon column structure glowing golden-yellow on the right. The elevated transit tracks recede to the left as the camera moves forward through the crosswalk, surrounded by the illuminated facades of commercial buildings and the reflective wet pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, corridor-like sidewalk into a wide, neon-lit urban intersection. It begins beneath building overhangs on a covered sidewalk, moving past dark concrete walls and metal barriers while tall digital billboards cast neon glows over the wet asphalt. As the camera progresses, the enclosed space opens up to reveal a striking yellow geometric building with cyan accents, passing a pedestrian in a white jacket as the initial billboards recede. The scene then expands into a broad intersection beneath an elevated transit line, with the camera crossing street markings and moving past the yellow architecture toward a modern glass office building. Finally, the movement completes the crossing as the transit tracks recede to the left, leaving the camera surrounded by reflective pavement and the golden-yellow glow of a vertical neon column.
